column1: # Universe: nifty 500 stocks tagged Large/Mid/Small in atlas_universe_stocks (STATIC_2026
# Window: 2018-01-01 to 2026-05-28 (8 yrs); excludes Micro per Q5 lock
# cap_tier source: STATIC (atlas_universe_stocks.tier) — PIT history insufficient (3 days); see weinstein-a2-cap-tier-decision.md
# Base rule: Stage 1 -> Stage 2 (UP) or Stage 3 -> Stage 4 (DOWN) crossover with persist_4w >= 0.6 (relaxed from 0.8)
#   L1: 5d avg vol >= 1.5x 60d avg vol      (pass rate 7-12%)
#   L3: RS_3m trend (improving for UP)       (pass rate 40-49%)
#   L4: stage1/3 persist 12W >= 0.5          (pass rate 33-47%; relaxed from 0.7 in plan)
#   L6: liquidity floor (5cr/2cr/50L)        (pass rate 94-99% — too loose)
#   L5 sector confluence: deferred (no sector RS data wired)
# Forward return: excess vs NIFTY 500 over 130 calendar days
# IC: Spearman (CORR between indicator and percent_rank(forward_excess_6m) within partition)
# Signed useful IC: ic_spearman for UP
# Hit rate: fraction of pass events with forward_excess_6m in expected direction (only among passers)
